targets.label: Gym Lifting

ai_coach.headline: Zero data logged today across nutrition, training, and weight -- adherence tracking went dark, not just the numbers.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No telemetry synced (sleep, HRV, RHR, body battery all blank), so there's no physiological read to work from tonight. Treat tomorrow as a fresh start and prioritize getting the watch/app syncing again before making any training-load calls.
action_plan: Log tomorrow's gym session in Hevy immediately post-workout, including working weights on the main compound lifts.
Enter meals in real time tomorrow rather than end-of-day so the 2750 kcal / 215g protein target actually gets tracked against intake.
Sync sleep, HRV, and RHR data before the day starts so tomorrow's evening review has something to assess.
Weigh in first thing tomorrow morning under consistent conditions to re-anchor the glide path.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Today shows 0 of the 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carb Gym Lifting target logged -- tomorrow, log meals as you eat them and hit the full protein target first, then fill carbs around training with 60% clustered pre/post workout.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight entry today and no history to compare against the glide path toward 83.0 kg -- get a morning weigh-in logged tomorrow to re-establish the trend line.
risk_flags: Zero gym sessions logged against 4 scheduled this cycle (0% adherence) -- confirm whether sessions were skipped or just unlogged.
No nutrition, sleep, or wearable data synced today -- adherence tracking itself has a gap that needs closing before any training/recovery decisions can be trusted.

overview.summary: Every metric -- weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, body battery -- is blank today, so there's no composite picture to read.
overview.suggestion: Open the tracking app tomorrow morning and confirm wearable sync is active before the first meal or workout.

plan.summary: With no weight entries and an empty glide path history, progress toward the 83.0 kg target and the next phase milestone can't be evaluated right now.
plan.suggestion: Log a morning weigh-in tomorrow so the glide-path comparison has a starting data point again.

training.summary: Gym adherence sits at 0 of 4 scheduled days logged this cycle, and no readiness or load data exists to judge whether that's a planned rest stretch or missed sessions.
training.suggestion: Get back on the schedule tomorrow with a standard lifting session and log it in Hevy the moment it's done.

gym.summary: No session data is on file, so there's nothing to compare against the current split or recent PRs.
gym.suggestion: Log tomorrow's session with exact working weights on the main lifts so bar-velocity priority can be tracked against the deficit.

sleep.summary: No sleep hours or stress/body-battery data came through last night, leaving recovery status unknown.
sleep.suggestion: Check wearable sync tonight before bed so tomorrow's sleep data actually populates.

nutrition.summary: 0 kcal logged against the 2750 kcal Gym Lifting target means today's intake is completely untracked, not necessarily zero.
nutrition.suggestion: Log every meal tomorrow in real time, prioritizing 215g protein first and pacing carbs 60% around the workout window.
